text: A 1.5 cm long incision at the 7th intercostal space of the mid-axillary line was placed as observing hole.
According to our practice, we retracted the lung by orbicular overweight grasping forceps up and dissected the posterior wall of the hilum.
Operation was then followed by dissection of lymph node in the station of 7, 10, 4, 5 and 11 in proper order.
